The '''Poodoo Lounge''' was an entertainment and dining venue in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

The [[Pre-Boonta Concert]] was held here, guest hosted by [[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]], starring [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]].

==Description==
The Poodoo Lounge was a cantina inside an adobe structure. The cantina stood three stories tall, had a street level entrance consisting of a sculpted, arched canopy, and a domed roof.<ref name="CSWE" />

{{Loc-stub}}
